_doc: Manually maintained Token X / ERX tokenized-securities data. Update by editing this file and refreshing the dashboard. There is no public API for these venues today (probed 2026-04-28).

tokens.name: Real Estate-Backed Token (sample)
tokens.notes: Replace with live tokenized-asset entries when available. Token X currently operates as an ICO portal under SCBX; secondary trading is limited.
